description: Recto: Instruction for payment. In Arabic script. Abū Saʿd is to pay the bearer the rent/wage for the previous month (Jumādā II), including an ounce of myrobalan, possibly for medicinal purposes. Verso: unidentified Arabic text, very fragmentary. (CUDL)
description_he: מסמך משפטי בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
